scripts.prestart: npm run preflight && npm run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/web run lint && uv run --directory apps/service ruff check .
scripts.unit: npm --prefix apps/web run test && uv run --directory apps/service pytest tests/unit
scripts.integration: npm run build && uv run --directory apps/service pytest tests/integration
scripts.browser-test: npm run build && playwright test --config browser-tests/playwright.config.mjs
scripts.test: npm run unit && npm run integration && npm run browser-test
